pull_requests.title: Fix viewer role permissions in API and worker
pull_requests.head: fix/viewer-permissions
pull_requests.body:
Restricts viewer-role users from updating or deleting tasks.

Related to viewer permission gaps in the API layer and worker notification path.

- [ ] API delete endpoint requires member role
- [ ] Worker skips notifications for viewer assignees

pull_requests.title: Skip assignment notifications for viewer-role users
pull_requests.head: qa/viewer-worker-skip
pull_requests.body:
Documents the intent to skip assignment notifications when the assignee has viewer role on the task team.

Small comment-only change above `isViewerOnTaskTeam` in the worker.

pull_requests.title: Clarify analytics page heading
pull_requests.head: qa/analytics-copy-fix
pull_requests.body: Updates the analytics page h1 to "Analytics Overview" for clearer copy.

pull_requests.title: Add CLI task export command (draft)
pull_requests.head: feature/task-export-cli
pull_requests.body:
WIP: adds `meridian-cli export` for exporting tasks to JSON/CSV.

Tracks enhancement request in the issue tracker. Not ready for review yet.

issues.title: Webhook retry test fails intermittently
issues.body:
## Description
The webhook retry integration test times out under load.

## Repro
1. Run `make fixture-test`
2. Observe `webhook-retry` timeout after 30s

## Expected
Retry completes within timeout budget.

issues.title: Analytics page shows stale data after refresh
issues.body: After a hard refresh, the analytics overview sometimes shows cached counts from the previous session.

issues.title: Add dark mode toggle to settings
issues.body: Users have requested a theme toggle in account settings.

issues.title: Should export format include archived tasks?
issues.body: When we add CLI export, should archived tasks be included by default or opt-in?

issues.title: What is the recommended worker concurrency?
issues.body: Running multiple worker replicas — is there a recommended `WORKER_CONCURRENCY` for production?

issues.title: Improve task search performance
issues.body: Full-text search on large workspaces is slow. Consider indexing `tasks.title`.

issues.title: Viewer can still delete tasks via API
issues.body:
Reported during permission audit: viewers may be able to call DELETE on tasks they should only read.

See open PR for proposed fix.

issues.title: Add webhook retry backoff
issues.body: Webhook delivery should use exponential backoff instead of fixed intervals.

issues.title: Add CLI task export command
issues.body:
## Summary
Add a CLI subcommand to export tasks for a workspace.

## Acceptance criteria
- `meridian-cli export --workspace <id> --format json|csv`
- Respects viewer role (read-only export)
- Documented in `apps/cli/README.md`

## Files likely involved
- `apps/cli/meridian_cli/main.py`
- `apps/api/meridian_api/routers/tasks.py`
